code: export class WheelModuleParser{constructor(){this._hasInfo=false;this._faces=[];this._payouts={};this._minBet=1;this._maxBet=5000;this._spinMs=2500;}flush(){this._hasInfo=false;this._faces=[];this._payouts={};this._minBet=1;this._maxBet=5000;this._spinMs=2500;return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;this._hasInfo=wrapper.readBoolean();const nFaces=wrapper.readInt();this._faces=new Array(nFaces);for(let i=0;i<nFaces;i++)this._faces[i]=wrapper.readString();const nPay=wrapper.readInt();this._payouts={};for(let i=0;i<nPay;i++){const key=wrapper.readString();const mul=wrapper.readInt();this._payouts[key]=mul;}this._minBet=wrapper.readInt();this._maxBet=wrapper.readInt();this._spinMs=wrapper.readInt();return true;}get hasInfo(){return this._hasInfo;}get faces(){return this._faces;}get payouts(){return this._payouts;}get minBet(){return this._minBet;}get maxBet(){return this._maxBet;}get spinMs(){return this._spinMs;}}
